name: Unagicon
description:
Unagicon is an annual nerd-culture festival in Ålesund for everyone interested in comics and manga, anime, fantasy and sci-fi, cosplay, K-pop, gaming and board / role-playing games.

The convention invites guests every year to hold workshops, panels and judge competitions, and it aims to bring people together around their hobbies in a welcoming environment.
notes: unagicon.com returned HTTP 403 to the fetcher on every attempt, so no images could be pulled from the official site. Event metadata (Deep Sea, 28-29 March 2026, Parken kulturhus) was confirmed via search-result snippets and the happeningnext + fjordnorway listings. Note: this event already happened by today (2026-04-27); the next Unagicon edition is not yet announced. Logo and banner left null — needs manual asset upload.
